title: philotheca buxifolia
intro: Philotheca buxifolia, also known as Waxflower, is a shrub native to Australia, belonging to the Rutaceae family of plants. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Philotheca buxifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and provide relief from digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
